name: vertex-ai-mcp-bridge
description: A bridge MCP server that integrates Google Vertex AI prompt management and optimization tools with Alibaba Cloud DashScope, supporting SSE-based deployment on Google Cloud Run.
author: hzy9981

tools.name: create_prompt
tools.description: Create a new prompt in Vertex AI.

tools.name: read_prompt
tools.description: Read a prompt from Vertex AI by ID.

tools.name: update_prompt
tools.description: Update an existing prompt in Vertex AI.

tools.name: list_prompts
tools.description: List all prompts in Vertex AI.

tools.name: call_dashscope_mcp
tools.description: Call a tool on the remote DashScope MCP server.
